payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: White-painted rectangular wall picture frame with white mat containing a small seascape print (blue sky and water with an orange boat/structure); lower-right of the frame and artwork are partially occluded by a diagonal brown wooden bannister/railing; appears wall-mounted and is approximately 1.2 m from the camera.
attributes: seascape print (blue sky and water, orange boat/structure)
partially occluded by diagonal brown wooden bannister
